label: SensorThings Bridge Demo
info: Demo Node-RED flow for the Brabantse Delta wastewater use case.

name: How to use
info:
1. Import this flow into Node-RED.
2. Update the HTTP request URL if needed.
3. Click the inject node to send wastewater demo readings to the connector preview endpoint.
4. Change the URL to /connector/ingest for live forwarding once the FROST server is configured.

name: Build wastewater payload
